mapper.update: INSERT INTO pdf_user_quota (user_id, quota_bytes) VALUES (#{userId}, #{quotaBytes}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE quota_bytes = #{quotaBytes}
INSERT INTO pdf_user_quota (user_id, allow_upload) VALUES (#{userId}, #{allowUpload}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE allow_upload = #{allowUpload}
mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, u.username AS username, u.nickname AS nickname, COALESCE(q.quota_bytes, 524288000) AS quotaBytes, COALESCE(q.allow_upload, 0) AS allowUpload, COALESCE(f.fileCount, 0) AS fileCount, COALESCE(f.totalSize, 0) AS totalSize FROM users u LEFT JOIN pdf_user_quota q ON q.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS fileCount, SUM(file_size) AS totalSize FROM pdf_files GROUP BY user_id ) f ON f.user_id = u.id WHERE COALESCE(f.fileCount, 0) > 0 OR q.user_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY COALESCE(f.totalSize, 0) DESC
